svg.title: GIT SVN - operation releated command overview

g.text: GIT SVN - operation releated command overview
Must only be done for commits that are not released to svn yet!
merge with fast forward only in case of integrating changes
from 'feature branches' to 'git managed svn branches'
(usually requires rebase on 'feature branch' to be run before)
rebase in case of integrating changes
from 'git managed svn branch' to 'feature branch'
